== System Requirements==
===PC===
====Minimum==== * '''OS:''' Windows XP * '''Processor:''' 1 GHz * '''Memory:''' 2 GB RAM * '''Graphics:''' any graphic card with 1 GB VRAM * '''Network:''' Broadband Internet connection * '''Hard Drive:''' 1 GB available space
====Recommended==== * '''OS:''' Windows 7 * '''Processor:''' Dual Core 2 GHz * '''Memory:''' 4 GB RAM * '''Graphics:''' any graphic card with 1 GB VRAM * '''Network:''' Broadband Internet connection * '''Hard Drive:''' 1 GB available space
===Mac===
====Minimum==== * '''OS:''' 10.8 * '''Processor:''' 1 GHz * '''Memory:''' 2 GB RAM * '''Graphics:''' any graphic card with 1 GB VRAM * '''Network:''' Broadband Internet connection * '''Hard Drive:''' 1 GB available space
===Recommended=== * '''OS:''' 10.8.5 * '''Processor:''' Dual Core 2 GHz * '''Memory:''' 4 GB RAM * '''Graphics:''' any graphic card with 1 GB VRAM * '''Network:''' Broadband Internet connection * '''Hard Drive:''' 1 GB available space

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Game |Guid=c4d463fa-4f7d-4f4a-8877-35653d3621a5 |Name=Legacy of Kain: Defiance Remastered |Image=Lok defiance remastered.jpg |Deck=Legacy of Kain: Defiance Remastered has been updated with new HD graphics, refined controls, and a modernized game camera with the ability to toggle between the HD and original presentation any time. This new edition also boasts a photo mode, alternate character skins, a comprehensive lore reader, and unreleased content and 'lost levels' fr..."
revision.text: {{Game |Guid=c4d463fa-4f7d-4f4a-8877-35653d3621a5 |Name=Legacy of Kain: Defiance Remastered |Image=Lok defiance remastered.jpg |Deck=Legacy of Kain: Defiance Remastered has been updated with new HD graphics, refined controls, and a modernized game camera with the ability to toggle between the HD and original presentation any time. This new edition also boasts a photo mode, alternate character skins, a comprehensive lore reader, and unreleased content and 'lost levels' from the original game. |ReleaseDateType=Full |Developers=Companies/Crystal Dynamics, Companies/PlayEveryWare |Franchises=Franchises/Legacy of Kain |Publishers=Companies/Crystal Dynamics }}

page.title: Games/LiM Beyond One on One Basketball/Credits

revision.text:
{{Game | Name=Liberator | Guid=3030-31793 | Deck=Space shooter based off the Atari Force comic. | ReleaseDate=1982-12-31 | ReleaseDateType=Year | Characters=Characters/Commander_Champion | Concepts=Concepts/Games_Based_on_Comic_Books,Concepts/Single_Word_Titles,Concepts/Trackball | Developers= | Franchises= | Genres=Genres/Shoot_Em_Up | Locations=Locations/Space | Objects= | Platforms=Platforms/Arcade,Platforms/PC,Platforms/Xbox_360_Games_Store | Publishers= | Games= | Themes=Themes/Sci_Fi | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/5150/1407224-11009601.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"1407224-11009601.jpg","path":"0\/5150\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,square_mini,square_medium,square_small,screen_medium,square_avatar,square_tiny,scale_small,scale_avatar,scale_large,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick","caption":""},"background":[]}' /> The targeting cross-hair looks like a red plus symbol in a diamond. The player shoots from the ships in each of the four corners. You're trying to shoot down enemy missiles, ships and the missile basses on different planets. The enemy missile basses are small flashing red targets. Destroying these missile bases quickly is key for passing a stage. If you lose a ship in a stage, it doesn't respawn at the start of the next one. If all four of your ships get destroyed then it's game over.

{{Game |Guid=ba250159-c374-470f-9987-206e8ce99130 |Name=Lifted |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--lifted-button-1759322777555-06-02-2026.jpg |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--lifted-blogroll-1780065710385-06-02-2026.webp |Deck=An action platformer set in an 80s time-traveling heist. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-07-22 |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/The 1980s, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Jump, Concepts/Polygonal 3D, Concepts/Time Travel |Developers=Companies/Adventure Works |Genres=Genres/Platformer |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Adventure Works |Themes=Themes/Fantasy }}

{{Game |Guid=63b03ba8-5f25-460d-9bc6-9d91d66b4a9d |Name=Lucid Falls |Image=Eldamar Studio1.jpg |BackgroundImage=Library hero 2x.jpg |Deck=A psychological horror game where gravity, space, and time have no rules. |ReleaseDateType=Full |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Polygonal 3D, Concepts/Steam |Developers=Companies/Eldamar Studio |Genres=Genres/Action Adventure |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Eldamar Studio |Themes=Themes/Horror }}
